sentences.target: Ich koche ein Ei zum Frühstück.

translations.de: Ich koche ein Ei zum Frühstück.
translations.en: I’m cooking an egg for breakfast.
translations.es: Cocino un huevo para el desayuno.
translations.fr: Je fais cuire un œuf pour le petit-déjeuner.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在为早餐煮一个鸡蛋。
translations.pt: Estou cozinhando um ovo para o café da manhã.
translations.vi: Tôi đang nấu một quả trứng cho bữa sáng.
translations.nl: Ik kook een ei voor het ontbijt.
translations.hi: मैं नाश्ते के लिए एक अंडा उबाल रहा हूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg koker et egg til frokost.
translations.id: Saya sedang merebus telur untuk sarapan.
translations.sv: Jag kokar ett ägg till frukost.
translations.ro: Fierb un ou pentru micul dejun.
translations.da: Jeg koger et æg til morgenmad.
translations.ja: 朝ごはんに卵をゆでています。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular nominative personal pronoun; subject of the finite verb 'koche'.
Finite verb, 1st person singular present; transitive predicate taking 'ein Ei' as its direct object.
Indefinite article, accusative singular neuter; determiner of 'Ei'.
Neuter noun, accusative singular; direct object of 'koche'.
Preposition contracted with a definite article ('zu dem'); governs dative and introduces the PP 'zum Frühstück' (purpose/time).
Neuter noun, dative singular as the object of the preposition 'zum'.

sentences.target: Wir brauchen ein Ei für den Kuchen.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ ˈbʁaʊ̯xn̩ aɪ̯n aɪ̯ fyːɐ̯ deːn ˈkuːxn̩/

translations.de: Wir brauchen ein Ei für den Kuchen.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ ˈbʁaʊ̯xn̩ aɪ̯n aɪ̯ fyːɐ̯ deːn ˈkuːxn̩/
translations.en: We need an egg for the cake.
translations.es: Necesitamos un huevo para el pastel.
translations.fr: Nous avons besoin d’un œuf pour le gâteau.
translations.it: Ci serve un uovo per la torta.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们需要一个鸡蛋做蛋糕。
translations.ru: Нам нужно одно яйцо для торта.
translations.pt: Precisamos de um ovo para o bolo.
translations.vi: Chúng ta cần một quả trứng để làm bánh.
translations.nl: We hebben een ei nodig voor de taart.
translations.uk: Нам потрібне одне яйце для торта.
translations.hu: Szükségünk van egy tojásra a tortához.
translations.hi: केक के लिए हमें एक अंडा चाहिए.
translations.el: Χρειαζόμαστε ένα αυγό για το κέικ.
translations.nb: Vi trenger ett egg til kaken.
translations.id: Kami perlu satu telur untuk kue.
translations.sv: Vi behöver ett ägg till kakan.
translations.ro: Avem nevoie de un ou pentru tort.
translations.da: Vi har brug for et æg til kagen.
translations.ja: ケーキに卵が一つ必要です。

tokens.explanation: 1st person plural nominative personal pronoun; subject of 'brauchen'.
Finite verb, 1st person plural present; transitive verb selecting 'ein Ei' as direct object.
Indefinite article, accusative singular neuter; determiner of 'Ei'.
Neuter noun, accusative singular; direct object of 'brauchen'.
Preposition governing accusative; introduces the PP 'für den Kuchen' indicating purpose.
Definite article, accusative singular masculine; determiner of 'Kuchen' as the object of 'für'.
Masculine noun, accusative singular; object of the preposition 'für'.

translations.pt: O ovo está cozido por completo.

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative singular neuter; determiner of 'Ei'.
Neuter noun, nominative singular; subject of the copula 'ist'.
Copular auxiliary, 3rd person singular present; links the subject to the predicate 'hart gekocht'.
Adverb modifying the adjectival participle 'gekocht'; expresses degree/manner ('hard-boiled').
Past participle used adjectivally as predicate complement with 'sein'; head of the predicate phrase.

sentences.target: Der Junge isst ein Ei mit Salz.
sentences.reading: /deːɐ̯ ˈjʊŋə ɪst aɪ̯n aɪ̯ mɪt zalts/

translations.de: Der Junge isst ein Ei mit Salz.
translations.ipa: /deːɐ̯ ˈjʊŋə ɪst aɪ̯n aɪ̯ mɪt zalts/
translations.en: The boy is eating an egg with salt.
translations.es: El niño come un huevo con sal.
translations.fr: Le garçon mange un œuf avec du sel.
translations.it: Il bambino mangia un uovo con il sale.
translations.pt: O menino come um ovo com sal.
translations.vi: Cậu bé ăn trứng với muối.
translations.nl: De jongen eet een ei met zout.
translations.hi: लड़का नमक के साथ अंडा खा रहा है.
translations.el: Το αγόρι τρώει ένα αυγό με αλάτι.
translations.nb: Gutten spiser et egg med salt.
translations.id: Anak laki-laki makan telur dengan garam.
translations.sv: Pojken äter ett ägg med salt.
translations.ro: Băiatul mănâncă un ou cu sare.
translations.da: Drengen spiser et æg med salt.
translations.ja: 男の子は塩をかけた卵を食べています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative singular masculine; determiner of 'Junge'.
Masculine noun, nominative singular; subject of 'isst'.
Finite verb, 3rd person singular present; transitive predicate taking 'ein Ei' as direct object and PP 'mit Salz' as instrument.
Indefinite article, accusative singular neuter; determiner of 'Ei'.
Neuter noun, accusative singular; direct object of 'isst'.
Preposition governing dative; introduces instrumental PP.
Neuter noun, dative singular as the object of 'mit'.
